flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Faulkner University rose 118% between 2021 and 2024 (11.9% → 25.9%).

flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Faulkner University rose 102% between 2021 and 2024 (18.5% → 37.4%).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Faulkner University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).
